_comment: Month is 2027-02 (28 days, non-leap). The row's worker fields (national_id/name/role/status/hours) are all valid; cell d01 = "AD" contains an illegal shift letter ('D' is not in A/B/C) -- AvailabilityCsvCellError('d01', ...), thrown from toWorkforceRow. Under the merged combined-CSV model this fails the WHOLE row atomically: the worker is NOT upserted either, so unlike the pre-merge availability-only fixture, no pre-existing worker needs to be seeded first.
call: WorkforceImportService.importCsv(csvText, month, companyId) -- no pre-existing worker required
